properties.severity_reason: impossible-speed position jumps
properties.why: 3 physically impossible movements for one MMSI · fastest implied speed 378 kn (a vessel cannot move this fast) · positions span 45 nm
properties.why_full: 3 physically impossible movements for one MMSI · fastest implied speed 378 kn (a vessel cannot move this fast) · positions span 45 nm
properties.caveats: Suspected AIS spoofing or MMSI conflict, not proven and not necessarily illegal. | Could also be a faulty GPS/transceiver or a transcription error in the feed. | Flagged only on a sustained pattern (several anomalies), not a single bad fix. | An inspection lead: confirm the vessel identity against authoritative records.
properties.caveat: Suspected AIS spoofing or MMSI conflict, not proven and not necessarily illegal.
properties.innocent: Impossible-looking movement can be GNSS jamming or a faulty GPS/transponder, not necessarily deliberate spoofing; flagged only on a sustained pattern.
